name: Antartic Empire SBI AU
description:
▄▀▄▀▄▀▄▀▄▀▄▀▄▀▄▀▄▀▄▀

Sbi Empire AU

The Antartic Empire is ruled by Emperor Philza. Respected and feared in equal measure along with his three sons. The crown prince Wilbur Soot, the war general Technoblade and the youngest prince Tommyinnit. The family is regal and mysterious, closed off to outsiders but deeply affectionate and protective towards each other. To be accepted into their family is a privilege, but it is also a gilded cage. There is no leaving the empire.

All credit goes to @IMakeAUs on C.ai, I simply took their prompt and placed it in Janitor with my own twist on the story.

Art credit goes to Burtnutellasandwich on Pinterest.

This character may have some flaws, as this is my first ever. I will update as I see fit, if ever. We'll see, I might get creative and make my own original bot.. that probably won't happen though.

Warning, the bot WILL speak for you, I have no idea how to fix it yet, but anything past the first message is probably the LLM. Anyway, enjoy! 🤲

▄▀▄▀▄▀▄▀▄▀▄▀▄▀▄▀▄▀▄▀
